hero.shaperBadge: Let us know if you are a Shaper visiting the city, click here!
hero.title: The power of youth in action!
hero.description1: We are a global network of volunteers working together to discuss and solve local, regional, and global challenges, enabling positive impact through dialogue and action.
hero.description2: Our mission is to build a community of young people with excellent skills and commitment to improving the state of the world.

languageExchange.title: Language Exchange
languageExchange.subtitle: Language learning for the Global Shapers community.

aboutGlobal.title: Global Shapers Community
aboutGlobal.description1: The Global Shapers Community is an initiative of the World Economic Forum that connects young leaders from around the world to promote positive impact in their communities and on a global scale.

description2.part2: the network brings together people working in different contexts and areas of activity,
description2.part3: strengthening projects and initiatives focused on social transformation in the cities where each Hub is located.

description3.part1: In Brazil, the community is present in the main state capitals, with
description3.part2: that connect young people collaboratively to drive structural changes and contribute
description3.part3: to the development of solutions for local and global challenges.

languageExchange.title: Language Exchange
languageExchange.description: The Language Exchange project is an initiative created to strengthen global connections within the Global Shapers Community through the exchange of languages and cultural experiences.

southMeeting.title: South regional meeting
southMeeting.description: The South Immersion was born as a space to transform connection into action: bringing people together, strengthening bonds between hubs, and reconnecting with the territory that moves us. In Florianópolis, we lived an experience that went beyond a meeting: it was about building together. The island was the starting point. The impact, we carry forward.

summit.title: Summit 2026/2027
summit.description1: Held in Geneva, Switzerland, the Global Shapers Annual Summit is the world's leading gathering of the Global Shapers community, bringing together young leaders from hundreds of cities to share experiences, strengthen connections, and co-create solutions for the world's most pressing challenges.
summit.description2: The Summit offers a unique opportunity to broaden perspectives, develop new competencies, and connect with a global network of change agents committed to building a more sustainable, inclusive, and resilient future.
summit.description3: Through lectures, workshops, strategic dialogues, and collaborative activities, participants gain access to globally relevant debates, intercultural exchanges, and connections that strengthen impact initiatives in their communities around the world.

nationalMeeting.title: National meeting
nationalMeeting.description1: The Global Shapers Brazil National Meeting 2026 has already set its destination: Belém, the gateway to the Amazon and symbol of our country's cultural and environmental wealth.
nationalMeeting.description2: On September 18-20, 2026, Shapers from across Brazil will gather for a transformative journey of learning, connection, and collective building. These three days will feature immersive experiences, inspiring exchanges, and collaboration to drive innovative solutions for present and future challenges.
nationalMeeting.description3: During the meeting, participants will experience: Immersive and inspiring experiences; Connection with Amazon culture, knowledge, and territories; High-impact workshops, panels, and dialogues; Quality networking with leaders and change agents from across the country; Spaces for co-creation and development of solutions for real challenges.

intro.part1: We are looking for young people who want to create
intro.part2: in their communities and help build a more collaborative, innovative and sustainable society.

requirements.title: To join Global Shapers Florianópolis, it is important to:
requirements.location: Live in Florianópolis or Greater Florianópolis;
requirements.age: Be 27 years old or younger at the time of application;
requirements.availability: Be available to attend Hub meetings (usually in the evening) and weekend activities;
requirements.interest: Show genuine interest in promoting positive change;
requirements.teamwork: Be willing to collaborate in a team and build solutions;
requirements.values: Be aligned with the values of leadership, diversity, inclusion and community engagement.

outro.part1: More than experience or a resume, we seek engaged, collaborative people who are
outro.part2: We want to hear your story!

description.part1: We will soon announce the dates for the next selection process.
description.part2: Leave your contact so we can notify you as soon as applications open!
